channel.title: Golang on Prasanna's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Golang on Prasanna's blog

item.title: Tweetpost
item.description: I was first exposed to the Go language back in 2013 when I was working with Apache Cloudstack. At the time, I was using Mitchell Hashimoto’s Packer for spinning up images in AWS. However, a switch of jobs took me in a different direction and I never delved deeper. Now, I’ve finally found some time to experiment with Go again. Language Review I went back to review the language using the excellent golang website.
